description: This file defines a repository class for managing 'Tale' objects in a database. It provides methods for listing, retrieving, creating, updating, deleting tales, as well as recording listens and fetching featured tales. It interacts with an SQLite database via the 'sqflite' package.

classes.name: TaleRepository
classes.description: Repository class handling CRUD operations and queries for 'Tale' objects in the database.

methods.name: listTales
methods.description: Fetches a list of tales filtered by optional category, age group, and search query.

methods.name: getTale
methods.description: Retrieves a single tale by its ID.

methods.name: createTale
methods.description: Creates a new tale entry in the database with specified details.

methods.name: updateTale
methods.description: Updates an existing tale record in the database.

methods.name: deleteTale
methods.description: Deletes a tale from the database by ID.

methods.name: recordListen
methods.description: Records a listen event for a specific tale.

methods.name: getListenCount
methods.description: Returns the total number of listens for a given tale.

methods.name: _taleFromRow
methods.description: Helper method to convert a database row into a Tale object.

methods.name: _categoryToDb
methods.description: Converts TaleCategory enum to its string representation for database storage.

methods.name: _ageGroupToDb
methods.description: Converts AgeGroup enum to its string representation for database storage.

methods.name: _categoryFromDb
methods.description: Converts a string from the database into a TaleCategory enum value.

methods.name: _ageGroupFromDb
methods.description: Converts a string from the database into an AgeGroup enum value.
